name: textarea-disabled
visual_summary: A disableable textarea is a text input component that cannot be edited by the user, often used in forms or data entry applications when input is required but cannot be modified.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: textarea-disabled
Description: A disableable textarea is a text input component that cannot be edited by the user, often used in forms or data entry applications when input is required but cannot be modified.
Style: e.g. minimal, standard
Interactions: e.g. none
Tags: registry:example, form-control, disabled

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
